name: ml-archer
description: Tomography-first ML architecture analysis with an explicit Lean/mathlib verification addon.

interface.shortDescription: Tomography first, formal verification only by explicit opt-in
interface.longDescription: Default flow is typed architecture tomography. Lean/mathlib verification is a separate addon for narrow subclaims and never replaces structural analysis.
defaultPrompt: Decompose this ML architecture into typed states, matrices, invariants, shortcut risks, and formalization candidates
Audit this ML architecture and separate structural findings, formalization candidates, engineering inference, and empirical gaps
Use the formal addon only if the user explicitly requests Lean or mathlib verification
